shortCompanyReason: Growing fostering agency with a purpose-led focus on children and families.
shortRoleReason: Chance to lead business operations in a fast-paced, purpose-driven environment.
companySummary: Evergreen Foster Care is a forward-thinking fostering agency focused on building futures for children and families, offering a supportive and impactful environment.
roleSummary: The Business Manager will oversee business and administrative functions, supporting leadership and ensuring the agency runs efficiently.
headlineAttraction: Be at the heart of a purpose-led fostering agency making a real impact.
rolePurpose: Ensure the smooth running of agency operations and support leadership in delivering effective foster care services.
probablePriorities: Support leadership and social work teams
advertSummary: Evergreen Foster Care seeks a driven Business Manager to lead HR, finance, IT, facilities, and compliance functions, support fostering panel processes, manage HR and payroll, and act as a key stakeholder liaison.
coreResponsibilities: Lead business and administrative functions across HR, finance, IT, facilities, and compliance
Support fostering panel processes, including minute-taking and coordination
Manage HR processes, safer recruitment, and employee records
Process payroll and foster carer payments
Oversee office operations, meetings, and training coordination
Act as a key liaison for stakeholders, carers, and external partners
Support social workers with administrative tasks
essentialRequirements: Proven experience in a business or senior administrative role
senioritySignals: Reports to Directors and Registered Manager

personalisedContent.personalisedOpening: I am excited to apply for the Business Manager role at Evergreen Foster Care. With a background in operational leadership and service improvement, I am drawn to opportunities where my work has a direct and meaningful impact.
personalisedContent.whyThisCompany: I am inspired by Evergreen Foster Care’s focus on changing lives for children and families and its forward-thinking approach to building a supportive fostering environment. I value working for organisations with a clear purpose and tangible community impact.
personalisedContent.whyThisRole: This role aligns perfectly with my experience managing business operations, HR processes, and compliance in fast-moving, multi-stakeholder environments. I thrive on bringing structure, financial control, and efficiency while supporting teams to deliver meaningful outcomes.

selectedEvidenceExamples.whyChosen: Demonstrates ability to improve service performance and financial control in a regulated environment
selectedEvidenceExamples.shortLine: Delivered operational turnaround boosting reviews to 4.51 and improving profit by £149.9k.

selectedEvidenceExamples.whyChosen: Shows capability in overseeing multi-function operations and process efficiency
selectedEvidenceExamples.shortLine: Led day-to-day operations improving gross profit margin from 29% to 39%.

selectedEvidenceExamples.whyChosen: Highlights experience supervising large teams and coordinating across functions
selectedEvidenceExamples.shortLine: Coordinated live operations across teams of 300+ in a KPI-led environment.

personalisedContent.fitSummary: I bring proven experience managing operations, HR processes, and compliance in complex, fast-paced settings. My background in regulated environments and service improvement makes me well equipped to support Evergreen Foster Care’s mission.
personalisedContent.likelyContributionSummary: I would ensure efficient agency operations, reliable compliance and HR processes, and smooth stakeholder coordination, freeing leadership to focus on delivering high-quality foster care services.
personalisedContent.cultureFitSummary: I thrive in fast-paced, purpose-driven environments where I can combine structure with empathetic stakeholder management.
personalisedContent.closingSummary: I would welcome the opportunity to bring my operational and administrative expertise to support Evergreen Foster Care’s vital work.
contentNotes: Company detail in advert is limited
